windows.embed_text_v2: Hands smoothing and flattening brown honeycomb kraft wrapping paper on a white packing desk to wrap a candle; sage and black-labeled wooden-lid candle jars and an open white mailer box staged behind.
windows.summary_v2: A hand smooths and spreads a sheet of brown honeycomb kraft paper flat on a packing desk, prepping it to wrap a candle beside staged candle jars and a mailer box.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a sheet of brown honeycomb kraft paper spread flat across a white packing desk; two wooden-lidded candle jars (sage and a black-labeled one) and an open white mailer box sit at the back, with a cloth and tape dispenser to the right.
Two manicured hands (pink-and-white nails, ring on one finger) enter from the right and press down flat onto the honeycomb wrapping paper, beginning to smooth it out.
Hands lift away; the brown honeycomb paper lies flattened on the desk in front of the staged candle jars and mailer box.
The honeycomb sheet has shifted slightly with a fingertip just visible at the bottom edge; candle jars and box remain in the background.
Hands out of frame; the spread honeycomb kraft paper sits centered on the white desk ready to wrap a candle.
Static overhead view of the flattened honeycomb wrapping paper with the two candle jars and white box behind it.
Fingertips of one hand reappear at the bottom of the honeycomb sheet, adjusting its position on the desk.
The right hand reaches onto the right side of the honeycomb paper, smoothing and pressing it flat against the white surface.
The right hand continues pressing and spreading the honeycomb kraft paper open near the candle jars, prepping it to wrap a candle for shipping.

windows.embed_text_v2: Hands wrapping a black wooden-lid candle jar in brown kraft paper for shipping; cream cotton drawstring muslin candle bag, open white gift box and kraft cardboard shipping box on a white packing desk, manicured hands.
windows.summary_v2: Manicured hands wrap a black wooden-lidded candle jar in brown kraft paper at a packing station, with a cotton drawstring candle bag, white gift box and cardboard shipping box staged nearby.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead packing-station view: an open kraft cardboard shipping box at left, a cream cotton drawstring muslin bag holding a candle in the center, an open white gift box, and an upright roll of brown kraft paper at right where a manicured hand reaches in.
The kraft paper has been unrolled flat on the right; a black candle jar with a wooden lid lies on it while the right hand (pink nails, ring) hovers nearby to begin wrapping.
Right hand works at the black candle on the kraft paper while the left hand's fingertips appear at the bottom edge near the muslin candle bag.
The right hand pinches and adjusts the edge of the brown kraft paper around the reclining black candle jar.
A hand rests flat on the white desk in the foreground beside the cotton drawstring bag; the black candle and kraft paper sit to the right.
The black wooden-lidded candle jar is stood upright on the kraft paper as the right hand begins rolling the paper around it.
Hands move out of frame; the black candle stands upright on the spread kraft paper beside the white gift box, muslin bag and open cardboard shipping box.
Static overhead view of the staged packing items: cardboard box, cotton candle bag, white gift box, and the black candle on brown kraft paper.
Final frame holds the arrangement with pink fingertips just entering at the bottom edge; black candle upright on kraft paper ready to be wrapped and boxed.
